'''âm-l-l-b''' ('''kamalleboko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:coannihilate|coannihilate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-l-l-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coannihilate|coannihilate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-l-l-b
|-
! Lemma
| kamalleboko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimaleboko|thimaleboko]] || [[word:jimaleboko|jimaleboko]] || [[word:shimaleboko|shimaleboko]] || [[word:kimaleboko|kimaleboko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumaleboko|thuthumaleboko]] || [[word:jujumaleboko|jujumaleboko]] || [[word:shushumaleboko|shushumaleboko]] || [[word:kukumaleboko|kukumaleboko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumaleboko|thumaleboko]] || [[word:jumaleboko|jumaleboko]] || [[word:shumaleboko|shumaleboko]] || [[word:kumaleboko|kumaleboko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themaleboko|themaleboko]] || [[word:jemaleboko|jemaleboko]] || [[word:shemaleboko|shemaleboko]] || [[word:kemaleboko|kemaleboko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomaleboko|thomaleboko]] || [[word:jomaleboko|jomaleboko]] || [[word:shomaleboko|shomaleboko]] || [[word:komaleboko|komaleboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomaleboko|thomaleboko]] || [[word:jomaleboko|jomaleboko]] || [[word:shomaleboko|shomaleboko]] || [[word:komaleboko|komaleboko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠmaleboko|thĂŠmaleboko]] || [[word:jĂŠmaleboko|jĂŠmaleboko]] || [[word:shĂŠmaleboko|shĂŠmaleboko]] || [[word:kĂŠmaleboko|kĂŠmaleboko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamaleboko|thamaleboko]] || [[word:jamaleboko|jamaleboko]] || [[word:shamaleboko|shamaleboko]] || [[word:kamaleboko|kamaleboko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamaleboko|thamaleboko]] || [[word:jamaleboko|jamaleboko]] || [[word:shamaleboko|shamaleboko]] || [[word:kamaleboko|kamaleboko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
